name: Chipotle Chicken Meatball Tacos
method: Put egg and bread in a bowl.
Add water and then mash them.
Add garlic and onion, then put cilantro, chicken, pepper, and salt. Mix
it well.
Brush a baking sheet with olive oil.
Make meatballs from the mixture and place on baking sheet, then pun
in the refrigerator for around 15 minutes.
Preheat oven to 475
Mix the remaining garlic and onion, jalapeno, chipotle, thyme,
tomatoes, and cinnamon, and blend until smooth.
In the oven, heat olive oil over the medium heat.
Add tomato puree, and add bay leaves; cook until sauce thickens.
Add 1 1/2 cups of water.
Lower the heat and simmer; stir occasionally.
Add salt.
Bake meatballs until brown for 8 minutes.
Put it in the sauce and simmer.
Spoon sauce over meatballs, until they are thoroughly cooked
Remove bay leaves, and cut meatballs into halves.
Serve in tacos with toppings.
